No vehicles match your search

Try adjusting your filters or contact us on WhatsApp for a custom order.

How It Works

Import your car from Japan or Europe in 4 simple steps

1

Choose Your Car

Browse live listings or tell us your budget and preferred model. We will find the best match from Japan.

2

Pay Deposit

Secure your vehicle with a KES 200,000 deposit. We source it from Japan immediately after confirmation.

3

We Ship It

Full export documentation, RORO shipping to Mombasa Port. Approximately 4 weeks transit time.

4

Drive It Home

Clear customs with our full support, pay the balance, and drive your Japanese import home.

Japan Auto Export  ·  Quality Cars to Kenya
